zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短期横盘偏多
zh.content:
从当前价格1.36668来看，XRP/USD在近期高点1.36914与低点1.36064之间震荡整理，短线呈现横盘偏多格局。价格略高于20日简单移动平均线SMA(20) 1.36369，显示多头仍有一定支撑，但上涨动能有限。MACD为-0.0061，虽然仍处于零轴下方，但有回升迹象，暗示市场情绪开始企稳。  

技术指标显示，RSI缺失，但价格守住SMA支撑，短期多空力量相对平衡。MACD线与信号线的负值交错提示市场存在微弱震荡，投资者需关注下一步能否突破1.3691阻力。若突破成功，可触发短期上行趋势；若未能突破，则可能回调至1.3606附近支撑区。  

关键支撑位在1.3606附近，多头若守住此位，则可维持震荡偏多格局。阻力位位于近期高点1.3691，突破后有望打开上行空间至1.3750。交易者可在支撑附近布局多单，并在阻力附近减仓或观望，以控制风险。止损建议略低于支撑位0.005左右，以防突发波动。  

综合来看，XRP/USD短期走势仍偏向震荡上行，多头力量略占优势。操作上应保持灵活，关注阻力突破与支撑守住情况，谨慎把握短线交易机会，避免追高，重点关注技术指标确认趋势信号。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD has shown a mild upward momentum in the short term, trading at 1.36668 with a 24-hour gain of 0.51%. The price is slightly above the 20-period simple moving average at 1.36369, suggesting mild bullish pressure. Intraday swings between 1.36064 and 1.36914 indicate consolidation within a narrow range. Traders may interpret this as a market waiting for a catalyst to either continue the uptrend or retrace toward support levels near 1.3600.  

The MACD currently stands at -0.0061, signaling that bearish momentum is still present but weak. Without the signal line, crossovers can’t be confirmed, yet the negative value suggests sellers still exert slight pressure. RSI data is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be gauged, making caution advisable. The price hovering just above the SMA reinforces a cautious bullish bias but also warns that a failure to hold the average could trigger a pullback.  

Immediate support lies around 1.3600, which has historically acted as a buying zone, while resistance is near 1.3690–1.3700, marking the recent high. A break above this resistance could open the path toward 1.3750, whereas a breakdown below support may lead to a retest of 1.3550. Traders should watch for increased volume around these levels, as it will confirm the strength of any breakout or breakdown.  

For short-term trading, a range-bound strategy could be effective, buying near 1.3600 and targeting 1.3690, with tight stop losses just below support. Longer-term traders may consider waiting for a confirmed breakout above 1.3700 for a sustained uptrend. Risk management is critical, given the limited momentum and mixed indicator signals, emphasizing disciplined position sizing and attention to key technical levels.
